title: IGF-1 LR3
description: Insulin-like Growth Factor 1 Long R3 (IGF-1 LR3) is a synthetic analog of human IGF-1 modified with an arginine substitution and an N-terminus extension to significantly reduce its affinity for binding proteins. This modification extends its half-life to approximately 20-30 hours, allowing for prolonged activation of the IGF-1 receptor to stimulate cellular proliferation, protein synthesis, and tissue regeneration.

research.title: Inhibition of activin-like kinase 4/5 attenuates cancer cachexia associated muscle wasting
research.summary: This study demonstrated that IGF-1 LR3 increases muscle fiber differentiation and nuclei count, showing synergistic potential in preventing muscle wasting when combined with myostatin inhibitors.

research.title: Revolutionary decellularized Alstroemeria stem-based nerve conduit integrated with GelMA and controlled IGF-1 LR3 release for enhanced rat sciatic nerve regeneration
research.summary: Research showed that controlled release of IGF-1 LR3 significantly enhances nerve regeneration and functional recovery in sciatic nerve injury models.

research.title: Sheep recombinant IGF-1 promotes organ-specific growth in fetal sheep
research.summary: Experiments confirmed that IGF-1 LR3 increases body weight, organ growth, and skeletal muscle myoblast proliferation, though it lacks the physiological regulation of natural IGF-1.

research.title: Coronary vascular growth matches IGF-1-stimulated cardiac growth in fetal sheep
research.summary: Administration of IGF-1 LR3 was found to increase cardiomyocyte proliferation and heart mass while maintaining proportional coronary vascular conductance.

research.title: Attenuated glucose-stimulated insulin secretion during an acute IGF-1 LR3 infusion into fetal sheep does not persist in isolated islets
research.summary: Infusion of IGF-1 LR3 was shown to decrease plasma insulin concentrations and reduce glucose-stimulated insulin secretion in vivo.

sentiment.summary: Users generally acknowledge its high potency for muscle growth and injury recovery, but frequent concerns regarding long-term cancer risks and impacts on insulin sensitivity create a cautious sentiment.

effects.label: Anabolic Potency:
effects.description: Considered significantly more effective than standard IGF-1 due to its resistance to binding proteins.

effects.label: Half-Life:
effects.description: Its extended duration of action (20+ hours) allows for systemic effects rather than just localized growth.

effects.label: Vascular Benefits:
effects.description: Research indicates it can promote cardiac and vascular growth in proportion to muscle expansion.

effects.label: Age Factors:
effects.description: Users with low natural IGF-1 baselines report more dramatic improvements in fatigue and recovery.

dosage.label: Experimental Range:
dosage.description: Common anecdotal research doses range from 20mcg to 100mcg per day.

dosage.label: Administration:
dosage.description: Typically administered via subcutaneous or intramuscular injection due to its peptide structure.

dosage.label: Protocol Length:
dosage.description: Frequently cycled for 4-6 weeks to avoid excessive down-regulation of native receptors.

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Often used post-workout to leverage peak nutrient sensitivity for recovery.

sideEffects.label: Hypoglycemia:
sideEffects.description: Can cause significant drops in blood sugar levels due to its insulin-like action.

sideEffects.label: Insulin Resistance:
sideEffects.description: Long-term use or high doses can impair natural glucose-stimulated insulin secretion.

sideEffects.label: Organ Growth:
sideEffects.description: Potential for unwanted growth of internal organs (visceromegaly) with prolonged use.

sideEffects.label: Cancer Risk:
sideEffects.description: Concerns exist that elevated IGF-1 levels may accelerate the growth of existing undiagnosed tumors.

availability.label: Research Chemicals:
availability.description: Primarily sold through research chemical sources as 'not for human consumption'.

availability.label: Grey Market:
availability.description: Significant presence in the bodybuilding community, though quality and purity vary between sources.

availability.label: Regulatory Status:
availability.description: Specifically banned by WADA and most professional athletic organizations as a performance-enhancing drug.
